title: 菊花賞の後に・されど大団円

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And in first is Mayano Top Guuuuun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff! Wheeze!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Members
text_block_list.text: Fujiii! You were wonderful! Good job!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
That was fantastic! I didn't know what to expect
after hearing about how she's more suited for mile
races...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
But she was astounding, win or lose! She tackled a
huge challenge head-on without even flinching!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Her next race is going to be the Arima Kinen,
right? Ooh, I can't wait to see it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Fuji Kiseki has failed to claim victory,
the audience is full of praise for her admirable
efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Passionate applause and cheers pour over her
from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I didn't take first, but I was able to run
my heart out thanks to all your support!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The curtain has closed on today's race, but I
promise an even greater miracle awaits you at the
next one!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Until then, farewell!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki bows politely toward the stands, snaps
her fingers, and...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Where's the smoke coming from?!
Where's Fuji Kiseki?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, she makes her graceful exit.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Just wondering, but how do you feel about taking
on the Takamatsunomiya Kinen next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after we return from Kyoto, Fuji Kiseki
stops by my office and opens a conversation with
that sudden question.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I assumed she would want to run in the Japan Cup
and the Arima Kinen, but I guess I was wrong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since the Takamatsunomiya Kinen is a sprint, I
can't help but wonder...
choice_data_list:
Are the long-distance races getting too
difficult?

Are the long-distance races getting too
difficult?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's not that! I mean, it's true that I'm not great
with long-distance races, but this has nothing to
do with that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There are still some odds and ends I need to
figure out, but I'll discuss everything with you
once I'm ready, okay?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
For now, can I please run the Takamatsunomiya
Kinen? I'm sorry to spring this on you, but would
it be okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have so many questions... but I'm sure she has a
plan, and I trust her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking—I want to put on an even bigger
show in my senior year than I did as a classic
racer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You must've seen all the articles people have
written about my trajectory on the Triple Crown
tour, right?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Fuji Kiseki is bolstered by cheers of support as
she takes on races against her aptitude."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Although her agenda has yet to be revealed,
expectations are high."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Everyone is looking forward to her next show."
Hehe! It's kind of embarrassing being lauded like
this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, almost every article out there
is filled with profuse praise for her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was able to pull off a grand finale, and it went
even better than I planned, to be honest!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure everyone's looking forward to an even
bigger miracle from me, and I can't disappoint
them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The praise extolling Fuji Kiseki shows no signs of
slowing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If anything, her charismatic speech, miraculous
exit from the venue, and theatrical announcement
boosted her popularity exponentially.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Countless articles and video clips about her are
uploaded every day.
